task_completion.description: Open VeraCrypt and start the Volume Creation Wizard
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VeraCrypt main application window is open and the 'Volume Creation Wizard' dialog is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Set the correct path for the new encrypted volume
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Volume Location step in the wizard shows the file path set to '/home/ga/Volumes/dailies_transfer.hc'.

task_completion.description: Configure AES encryption, SHA-512 hash, and 64 MB volume size
task_completion.visual_evidence: The wizard screens show 'AES' selected for Encryption Algorithm, 'SHA-512' for Hash Algorithm, and the Volume Size explicitly set to '64 MB'.

task_completion.description: Enter the password and select the exFAT filesystem for formatting
task_completion.visual_evidence: The password entry screen shows characters entered, and the Volume Format screen clearly shows 'exFAT' selected in the Filesystem dropdown menu.

task_completion.description: Mount the newly created volume to a free slot
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VeraCrypt main window shows '/home/ga/Volumes/dailies_transfer.hc' actively mounted to one of the numbered drive slots.

task_completion.description: Copy the production manifest file into the mounted volume
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager window displays the contents of the mounted VeraCrypt volume, and 'production_manifest.csv' is visible inside it.

task_completion.description: Dismount the volume after the file transfer is complete
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VeraCrypt main window shows that the previously used slot is now empty, indicating the volume has been successfully dismounted.

integrity.description: The agent used the VeraCrypt graphical user interface rather than terminal commands
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the VeraCrypt GUI windows and dialogs, not a terminal window executing 'veracrypt' CLI commands.

integrity.description: The agent actually formatted the volume using the wizard
integrity.visual_evidence: The Volume Format screen should be visible showing the randomness pool collection (mouse movement) or a 'Volume created successfully' confirmation dialog.

integrity.description: The agent copied the actual manifest file rather than creating a fake text file
integrity.visual_evidence: A file manager window should be used to copy/paste or drag/drop the file from Documents to the mounted volume, rather than a text editor being used to create a new file named 'production_manifest.csv'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The volume must be created exactly at '/home/ga/Volumes/dailies_transfer.hc'. The volume size must be exactly 64 MB. The encryption must be AES with SHA-512 hash. The filesystem must be formatted as exFAT. The password must be 'ProductionSafe2024!'. The file '/home/ga/Documents/production_manifest.csv' must be copied into the mounted volume before it is dismounted.
